name: flato-mcp-operator
description: Operate Flato designs through the Flato MCP server with the required project, context, write, and QA workflow.

interface.shortDescription: Guide Codex through reliable Flato MCP design editing.
interface.longDescription: Installs the Flato MCP server configuration and a workflow skill that tells Codex how to establish a project, read Flato creative context, use explicit page and block ids, apply design edits, inspect MCP feedback, and verify rendered output.
defaultPrompt: Use Flato MCP to inspect and edit this design.
Create a new Flato design through MCP.
Revise the selected Flato block safely.
